title: Storage Plugin
description: This is the survival project I was working that helps to sort all items into barrels. You just need to provide locations and add materials and ualia!
body:
This plugin will help you in survival.
If you wanted to have auto sorting items into barrels, you now can.

## Commands
- /s - Opens GUI where you can pass items to be sorted into barrels.
- /s r - Opens GUI where you can pass resources (Barrels, signs) to be used when building barrels and signs on barrel. (Required ofc)
- /s chunks [start|end] - Create a new chunk where barrels will be placed. All barrels will have 1 gap between them to be able to place signs on barrels. You need to look at the block when executing the command from where to where you want to create chunk. Only [end] creates new chunk if all criterias meets.
- /s reset - Admin command to erase database, barrels and chunks. **(use with caution as this will delete all items inside the barrels and won't give them back to owner)**
- /s s - Will check if you have currently holding item in your hands an barrel.
- /s hl [Material] - You can highligh an sign to show where the item is. (Supports tab completion thank god, or you can just hold item and leave [material] empty)
